## Quality gates

<!-- CI runs the same checks. Tick what you ran locally. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint:manifests`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run verify-dist` — rebuilt and committed `dist/` if the MCP server changed

## Versioning & changelog

- [ ] Bumped `plugin.json`, mirrored it in `marketplace.json` and the server `package.json` (for a release-worthy change)
- [ ] Updated the relevant `CHANGELOG.md`
